• Procedural mining world with depth‑based heat, ore tiers and AOE mining.
  • Full UI: mobile controls, HUD gauges, minimap, chat, shop, inventory and admin panel.
  • Multiplayer via MQTT, host election, sync of tile updates, explosions and trading.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Sound.init();

This HTML page implements a 2‑D mining game where players dig, build, trade and manage resources. It features a procedural map, real‑time multiplayer synchronization, customizable textures, sound effects, and a comprehensive UI for settings, shop, inventory, and admin controls. All gameplay logic, rendering, and networking are handled client‑side.​
